name: Russian Train Trip 3
short_description: A first-person adventure game with a deep plot. You have to get from Tyumen to Novosibirsk on a passenger train. You can look out the window and watch the changing nature, weather and architecture. You can see forests, fields, mountains, cities and villages.
detailed_description:
Trans-Siberian Express


Russian Train Trip


Russian Train Trip 2


Train Travel Simulator


Chinese Train Trip


About the Game

You are a passenger on a train leaving from Tyumen to Novosibirsk. Your goal is to get to the end point.

The game consists of several stages with a full-fledged interesting plot.

You can look out the window and watch the changing nature, weather and architecture, listen to the radio and watch TV. You can see forests, fields, mountains, cities and villages.

The game offers you a fascinating journey across Russia by train, full of adventures, discoveries and emotions.

supported_languages:
English, Russian*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
